commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh But Absalom sent spies throughout all the tribes of Israel, saying, As soon as you hear the sound of the trumpet, then you shall say, Absalom reigns in Hebron. Spies, or men to give a plausible appearance to his ambition, and to insinuate that all was done according to order, and with David's approbation. "The first word (or step) is the most difficult "on such occasions; (Tacitus, Hist. ; Grotius) and those who find themselves incautiously entangled, find a repugnance to recede. (Haydock) Reigneth. He was solemnly anointed, chap. (Menochius).
